generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 360-degree point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for stereo vision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidar
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data processed through DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo depth image data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data from onboard sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data from onboard sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance 3DVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for environmental representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software development"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataStorageService, ACCComputationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for environmental representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance UserInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User interface for remote ACC management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCRemoteManagementService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data storage for vehicle telemetry and processed data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation from stored vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance ACCComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading adaptive cruise control logic computation to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationInsight
]

instance ACCRemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC via user interface for enabling/disabling, speed adjustment, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed display for driver trust and decision-making"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle display for driver trust and decision-making"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracks display for driver trust and decision-making"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path display for driver trust and decision-making"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle data stored in SQL database for historical analysis"
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for vehicle performance and diagnostics"
]

instance ACCComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adaptive cruise control logic computation results from cloud infrastructure"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable adaptive cruise control via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable adaptive cruise control via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust ACC speed via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on the vehicle"
    base:contains MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosted on cloud infrastructure"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for remote interaction with the Digital Twin"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle control"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking), enable/disable commands, and speed modifications from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling Functional Entity to the Physical Twin Entity's Actuation Functional Entity for motor and steering control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency of ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms between all components to meet safety-critical requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; components organized into Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time monitoring and control, and design phase for system validation and experimentation during development."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized and translated via Data Translation Functional Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted on cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT design; ISO 15622 compliance for adaptive cruise control functionality."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure safe operation; remote emergency braking capability for safety."
]
